summary: Cross-UI IST consistency end-to-end verified. Injected 7 fresh defects (5 orange ≤24h + 2 red >30h) via POST /api/inspections covering 5 distinct (asset_type x station) buckets + 2 extras. All 13 backend tests pass (5 new IST cross-UI + 7 existing IST/validation + 1 audit list_consistency 9/9 invariants). Frontend Playwright PASSED on Superadmin/SUP/ASUP across all 6 spec items: (a) /orange-list renders every defect as a row with naive-IST literal '<DD MMM YYYY>, <hh:mm AM/PM>' format, (b) zero forbidden tokens (+05:30, GMT, UTC, trailing-Z) on any page, (c) all 4 split health tiles present and non-zero on Superadmin (working 25, orange 10, red 30, pending 9) and matching API exactly, (d) pie chart legend has only Orange/Red/Working — no Yellow slice, (e) sup-health-tile-pending-verification = 8 on SUP dashboard, (f) oversight-health-tile-pending-verification = 9 on ASUP dashboard, (g) cross-page byte-identical timestamp: OL row shows '07 May 2026, 05:43 AM' and the same string appears identically inside the expanded Remarks drawer for the same asset.

ui_bugs.issue: Tab counts on the page header read 'Orange (10) | Red (12) | Yellow List (3)' = 25, but API actually returns orange=10, red=30, pending_approval=9 (49 total). Footer correctly shows 'Showing 25 of 49'. The tab badges appear to count items on the CURRENT PAGE (page-size 25) rather than the totals — so the Red badge under-reports by 18. Suggest using the unfiltered totals for the tab counts.

ui_bugs.component: Remarks drawer auto-rectification remark timestamp formatting
ui_bugs.issue: Auto-generated 'DEFECT REPORTED' remark inside the Remarks drawer shows time as '07 May, 05:13 pm' (no year, lowercase pm) while the row above shows '07 May 2026, 05:43 AM'. Both are naive-IST literals (no offset/Z), so the timezone-fidelity rule still holds, but the format string is inconsistent across surfaces.
ui_bugs.selector: Remarks drawer event timestamp (top-right of remark card)

action_items: Tab-count badges on OrangeListPage (Orange/Red/Yellow) should use TOTAL list size, not current page slice. API counts: orange=10, red=30, yellow(pending_approval)=9.
Standardize datetime format inside Remarks drawer auto-events to match the row format '<DD MMM YYYY>, <hh:mm AM/PM>'.
critical_code_review_comments: TabBadge counts in /app/frontend/src/pages/OrangeListPage.js appear to be derived from the paginated response items, not the total counts returned by /api/orange-list. Either request a counts-only summary or compute from a non-paginated fetch.

Auto-generated remark timestamp formatter (likely in remark/event renderer) uses a different formatDateTime variant than the row renderer in OL page — consolidate to a single formatDateTime in /app/frontend/src/lib/utils.js.
test_credentials.md still has no working admin-role password — admin-tile testid was source-verified only in iteration 16; no change since.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_ist_cross_ui_consistency.py (NEW — 5 tests: orange-list IST format after injection, superadmin dashboard count consistency, oversight category-assets priority bucket, SUP scope IST format, ASUP scope IST format)

success_rate.frontend: 100% spec items verified — Superadmin OL page IST literal format, 4 health tiles, no Yellow legend, click-into Remarks drawer IST format, SUP pending-verification tile, ASUP oversight pending-verification tile, byte-identical cross-page timestamp

test_credentials: SA001/admin123 (verified), SSE001/admin123 (verified), ASUP001/admin123 (verified). All three roles logged in OK during this iteration.
seed_data_creation: 7 new defective inspections created via POST /api/inspections (5 orange + 2 red) on 7 working assets across 5 distinct (asset_type x station) buckets. All TEST_-prefixed remarks. Persistent in DB; audit still passes 9/9 after injection. Health counts now: working=25, orange=10, red=30, pending=9 (was working=32 pre-injection).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/test_ist_cross_ui_consistency.py /app/backend/tests/test_ist_and_validation.py /app/backend/tests/test_list_consistency.py -v. test_ist_cross_ui_consistency.py needs ≥5 distinct (type x station) working buckets + 2 more working assets (=7 total) — it pytest.skip()s gracefully if not enough. Each run consumes 7 working assets. The OL page tab-badge mismatch (Red(12) vs api red=30) is a separate UI bug worth main-agent attention — the underlying datetime fidelity is correct. Health tile testids: 'health-tile-{working|orange|red|pending-verification}' (Superadmin), 'sup-health-tile-pending-verification' (SUP), 'oversight-health-tile-pending-verification' (ASUP). IST literal regex on UI: r'\d{1,2}\s+[A-Z][a-z]{2}\s+\d{4},?\s*\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s*(?:AM|PM)'.
rca of the issue: N/A — no IST/timezone issue found. All datetime fields on backend responses are bare-naive ISO (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, no Z, no offset). Frontend formatDateTime parses literal string parts and renders '<DD MMM YYYY>, <hh:mm AM/PM>'. Cross-page timestamp comparison (OL row vs Remarks drawer) is byte-identical for the same asset. Two minor UI-format observations are noted as separate items: (1) OL tab-badge counts reflect current page rather than totals — under-reports Red by ~18 entries, (2) auto-event remark timestamp inside drawer omits year and uses lowercase am/pm — still naive IST but format string differs from the row format.
